LINE_BENE_PMT_AMT 

LABEL: Line Payment Amount to Beneficiary 

DESCRIPTION: The payment (reimbursement) made to the beneficiary related to the line-item service on the non-
institutional claim. 

SHORT NAME: LBENPMT 

LONG NAME: LINE_BENE_PMT_AMT 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 12 

SOURCE: NCH 

VALUES: —
